results.name: hume
results.description: Human race from Final Fantasy XI

results.name: hunger
results.description: Creatures dying to this one make this one grow stronger. Coined by Maro: http://markrosewater.tumblr.com/post/178364542148

results.name: hunger reanimation
results.description: Creatures this one kills come back into play under your control.

results.name: hunger trigger
results.description: Abilities that trigger off other creatures dying to this one. Named after the more-specific Hunger ability.

results.name: hungry demon
results.description: Cards that make you sacrifice a creature, either automatically or with a downside if you can't or won't.

results.name: hurloon mountains
results.description: The Hurloon Mountain range of Dominaria

results.name: hurricane
results.description: Spells that deal damage to creatures with flying. See [earthquake] for the inverse effect.

results.name: huu
results.description: A swampbender whose signature move is bending vines around himself, kind of like a low-tech swampy mech suit.

results.name: hybrid
results.description: Hybrid creatures. Not to be confused with [anthropomorphic](anthropomorphic).

results.name: hydra (marvel)
results.description: The organization.

results.name: hydromancy
results.description: The magical art of manipulating water.

results.name: hyphenated
results.description: This has text that is too long, and thus need to have a hyphen to show when it's going to the nex- t line down (Either in Rules or Flavor)

results.name: hyur
results.description: Human race in Final Fantasy XIV

results.name: icatia
results.description: A Dominarian empire destroyed by goblins and orcs.

results.name: idol of moloch
results.description: A horned statue with jeweled eyes famously depicted on the cover of the classic Advanced Dungeons and Dragons Player's Handbook (1978).

results.name: i don't feel so good mr stark
results.description: Someone disintegrating, as if snaptured by Thanos (from the movie Avengers: Infinity War)

results.name: iliona
results.description: The eldest of the Vendilion Clique triplets, and their de facto leader.

results.name: illusion ability
results.description: Permanents that sacrifice themselves if they get targeted by anything

results.name: ilysia
results.description: The idyllic afterlife for heroes who die on Theros.

results.name: immersturm
results.description: One of the ten realms of Kaldheim, land of demons.
